message:
fix: complete QueryModeError migration — zero plain Error in all DOs

- query-do: remaining 13 throw sites → QueryModeError with proper codes
  (MEMORY_EXCEEDED for WASM OOM, QUERY_FAILED for execution/fragment
  failures, INVALID_FORMAT for footer/file parse errors, TABLE_NOT_FOUND
  for missing R2 objects)
- worker-do: R2 get/put wrapped in withTimeout(10s), unknown task throw
  → QueryModeError("QUERY_FAILED")
- All 4 DO files (master-do, query-do, fragment-do, worker-do) now have
  zero plain Error throws
